reasonstring⬜ nullable
📦 Entities (7)
▸Entity: 📦 Money🔗 #entity-money
Stronger-typed money than HubRise's "9.80 EUR" string. Converted at the HubRise boundary (parse + x100), kept as integer minor units + currency internally.
FieldTypeReq.Description
amountCents🔤 MoneyCents✅ required
currency🔤 CurrencyCode✅ required
▸Entity: 📦 CustomerContact🔗 #entity-customercontact
FieldTypeReq.Description
displayName🔤 CustomerDisplayName✅ required
email🔤 EmailAddress⬜ optional
phone🔤 PhoneNumber✅ required
▸Entity: 📦 CartLineItem🔗 #entity-cartlineitem
A line stored in a cart: the customer's selection by id (no prices stored).
FieldTypeReq.Description
cartLineId🔤 CartLineId✅ required
offerId🔤 OfferId✅ required
quantityinteger✅ required
selectedOptionIds[🔤 OptionId]⬜ optional
▸Entity: 📦 Cart🔗 #entity-cart
A customer's in-progress selection for a SINGLE restaurant. customerId is null while the visitor is still a guest; it is bound at checkout once the phone is verified.
FieldTypeReq.Description
id🔤 CartId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
customerId🔤 CustomerId⬜ nullable
status🔤 CartStatus✅ required
lines[📦 CartLineItem]✅ required
▸Entity: 📦 SelectedOption🔗 #entity-selectedoption
An option chosen by the customer on a line item, priced at order time.
FieldTypeReq.Description
optionId🔤 OptionId✅ required
optionListId🔤 OptionListId⬜ optional
name🔤 OptionName✅ required
price📦 Money✅ required
▸Entity: 📦 OrderLineItem🔗 #entity-orderlineitem
FieldTypeReq.Description
offerId🔤 OfferId✅ required
productId🔤 ProductId⬜ optional
name🔤 ProductName✅ required
offerName🔤 OfferName⬜ nullable
quantityinteger✅ required
unitPrice📦 Money✅ required
selectedOptions[📦 SelectedOption]⬜ optional
lineTotal📦 Money✅ required(unitPrice + sum(selectedOptions.price)) * quantity, computed server-side.
▸Entity: 📦 Order🔗 #entity-order
FieldTypeReq.Description
id🔤 OrderId✅ required
ref🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullable
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required
customerId🔤 CustomerId⬜ nullable
customerContact📦 CustomerContact✅ required
serviceType🔤 ServiceType✅ required
deliveryAddress📦 Address⬜ nullable
items[📦 OrderLineItem]✅ required
totalAmount📦 Money✅ required
status🔤 OrderStatus✅ required
note🔤 OrderNote⬜ nullable
🔤 Scalars (15)
ScalarTypeDescription
🔤 OptionIdstring uuid
🔤 OrderIdstring uuid
🔤 CartIdstring uuid
🔤 CartLineIdstring uuidIdentifies a line within a cart, used to edit its quantity or remove it.
🔤 CorrelationIdstring uuidCorrelates a command with the events/state it produces. Returned by every mutation payload so the client can track the outcome via the read side (matches domain_events.correlation_id).
🔤 PaymentIntentIdstringStripe PaymentIntent id (provider reference). Example: 'pi_3Nabc...'.
🔤 RefundIdstringStripe Refund id (provider reference). Example: 're_3Nabc...'.
🔤 MoneyCentsintegerMonetary amount in minor units (e.g. cents).
🔤 OrderNotestring
🔤 StarRatingintegerRestaurant rating in stars (0–5), given by the customer on a delivered order.
🔤 ThumbRatingenum (UP | DOWN)Rider rating: thumbs up or down.
🔤 RatingCommentstringFree-text comment accompanying a restaurant rating.
🔤 OrderStatusenum (PLACED | ACCEPTED | REJECTED | PREPARING | READY | OUT_FOR_DELIVERY | DELIVERED | CANCELLED_BY_CUSTOMER | CANCELLED_BY_RESTAURANT)
🔤 CartStatusenum (OPEN | CHECKED_OUT)Lifecycle of a cart. Only an OPEN cart accepts line edits or checkout. Carts are never abandoned/expired — they persist until checked out, so there is no abandonment state.
🔤 PaymentStatusenum (PENDING | CAPTURED | FAILED | REFUNDED)Order payment state, folded from Stripe facts (PaymentIntentCreated/Captured/Failed/Refunded).
⛔ Errors (18)
ErrorDescriptionMessage (en)Message (fr)Thrown by
⛔ RestaurantPausedRestaurant acceptance mode is PAUSED; it cannot take orders.🇬🇧 '{restaurantName}' is not taking orders right now.🇫🇷 '{restaurantName}' ne prend pas de commandes pour le moment.📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ OfferUnavailableOffer availability is UNAVAILABLE (manual flag).🇬🇧 '{productName}' ({offerName}) is currently unavailable.🇫🇷 '{productName}' ({offerName}) est actuellement indisponible.📩 AddCartLine, 📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ InsufficientStockRequested quantity exceeds available stock.🇬🇧 Only {available} left of '{productName}' ({offerName}), but {requested} were requested.🇫🇷 Il ne reste que {available} de '{productName}' ({offerName}), mais {requested} ont été demandés.📩 AddCartLine, 📩 ChangeCartLineQuantity, 📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ QuantityExceedsLimitRequested quantity exceeds the per-line maximum.🇬🇧 You can't order that many of '{productName}'.🇫🇷 Vous ne pouvez pas commander autant de '{productName}'.📩 AddCartLine, 📩 ChangeCartLineQuantity
⛔ InvalidOptionSelectionA selected option does not belong to the offer, or violates the option list's min/max.🇬🇧 Invalid option selection for '{productName}'.🇫🇷 Sélection d'options invalide pour '{productName}'.📩 AddCartLine, 📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ CartNotFoundNo cart with this id.🇬🇧 Cart not found.🇫🇷 Panier introuvable.📩 AddCartLine, 📩 RemoveCartLine, 📩 ChangeCartLineQuantity, 📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ CartNotOpenCart is not OPEN (already checked out).🇬🇧 This cart can no longer be modified.🇫🇷 Ce panier ne peut plus être modifié.📩 AddCartLine, 📩 RemoveCartLine, 📩 ChangeCartLineQuantity, 📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ CartRestaurantMismatchLine/checkout restaurant differs from the cart's restaurant (no mixing).🇬🇧 Your cart already has items from another restaurant, not '{restaurantName}'.🇫🇷 Votre panier contient déjà des articles d'un autre restaurant que '{restaurantName}'.📩 AddCartLine, 📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ CartLineNotFoundNo line with this id in the cart.🇬🇧 This cart line no longer exists.🇫🇷 Cette ligne du panier n'existe plus.📩 RemoveCartLine, 📩 ChangeCartLineQuantity
⛔ CartEmptyCheckout attempted on an empty cart.🇬🇧 Your cart is empty.🇫🇷 Votre panier est vide.📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ OrderNotFoundNo order with this id.🇬🇧 Order not found.🇫🇷 Commande introuvable.📩 AcceptOrder, 📩 StartPreparation, 📩 MarkOrderReady, 📩 MarkOrderDelivered, 📩 RejectOrder, 📩 CancelOrderByCustomer, 📩 CancelOrderByRestaurant, 📩 RateOrder, 📩 RateRestaurant, 📩 TipRider, 📩 RequestRefund
⛔ InvalidOrderStatusOrder is not in a status that allows this transition.🇬🇧 This action is not allowed while the order is '{currentStatus}'.🇫🇷 Cette action n'est pas autorisée tant que la commande est '{currentStatus}'.📩 AcceptOrder, 📩 StartPreparation, 📩 MarkOrderReady, 📩 MarkOrderDelivered, 📩 RejectOrder, 📩 CancelOrderByCustomer, 📩 CancelOrderByRestaurant, 📩 RateOrder, 📩 RateRestaurant, 📩 TipRider, 📩 RequestRefund
⛔ OrderAlreadyRatedThe delivery (rider thumb) has already been rated for this order; final.🇬🇧 You have already rated this delivery.🇫🇷 Vous avez déjà noté cette livraison.📩 RateOrder
⛔ RestaurantAlreadyRatedThe restaurant has already been rated for this order; final (one per order).🇬🇧 You have already rated the restaurant for this order.🇫🇷 Vous avez déjà noté le restaurant pour cette commande.📩 RateRestaurant
⛔ RiderAlreadyTippedThe rider has already been tipped for this order.🇬🇧 You have already tipped the rider for this order.🇫🇷 Vous avez déjà laissé un pourboire au livreur pour cette commande.📩 TipRider
⛔ DeliveryAddressRequiredserviceType is DELIVERY but no delivery address was provided.🇬🇧 A delivery address is required for delivery.🇫🇷 Une adresse de livraison est requise pour la livraison.📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ OutsideDeliveryAreaDelivery address is outside the restaurant's delivery area.🇬🇧 This address is outside the delivery area of '{restaurantName}'.🇫🇷 Cette adresse est en dehors de la zone de livraison de '{restaurantName}'.📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ PaymentDeclinedStripe declined the payment synchronously at checkout (no order placed).🇬🇧 Payment was declined.🇫🇷 Le paiement a été refusé.📩 PlaceOrder
🧪 Tests (4)

🎭 Cart

▸Test: 🧪 TestCartFirstLineAdded🔗 #test-testcartfirstlineadded
Adds the first line to a new cart (the cart is created)
given: (none)
when: 📩 AddCartLine
then: ⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartLineAdded
▸Test: 🧪 TestCartAddLineIsRejectedWhenOfferNotOrderable🔗 #test-testcartaddlineisrejectedwhenoffernotorderable
Rejects adding a line when the offer is unknown, unavailable, or out of stock
given: (none)
when: 📩 AddCartLine
thrown: ⛔ OfferNotFound, ⛔ OfferUnavailable, ⛔ InsufficientStock
▸Test: 🧪 TestCartAddLineIsRejectedWhenCartInvalid🔗 #test-testcartaddlineisrejectedwhencartinvalid
Rejects adding a line on a missing/closed/mismatched cart, with a bad option selection, or over the quantity limit
given: (none)
when: 📩 AddCartLine
thrown: ⛔ CartNotFound, ⛔ CartNotOpen, ⛔ CartRestaurantMismatch, ⛔ InvalidOptionSelection, ⛔ QuantityExceedsLimit
▸Test: 🧪 TestCartLineQuantityChanged🔗 #test-testcartlinequantitychanged
Changes the quantity of an existing cart line
given: ⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartLineAdded
when: 📩 ChangeCartLineQuantity
then: ⚡ CartLineQuantityChanged
▸Test: 🧪 TestCartLineRemoved🔗 #test-testcartlineremoved
Removes a line from a cart
given: ⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartLineAdded
when: 📩 RemoveCartLine
then: ⚡ CartLineRemoved
▸Test: 🧪 TestCartRemoveLineIsRejected🔗 #test-testcartremovelineisrejected
Rejects removing a line from a missing/closed cart or a line that does not exist
given: (none)
when: 📩 RemoveCartLine
thrown: ⛔ CartNotFound, ⛔ CartNotOpen, ⛔ CartLineNotFound

🎭 Order

▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderAcceptedByRestaurant🔗 #test-testorderacceptedbyrestaurant
Restaurant accepts a placed order
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced
when: 📩 AcceptOrder
then: ⚡ OrderAcceptedByRestaurant
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderAcceptIsRejected🔗 #test-testorderacceptisrejected
Rejects accepting a missing order or one not in an acceptable status
given: (none)
when: 📩 AcceptOrder
thrown: ⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderPreparationStarted🔗 #test-testorderpreparationstarted
Restaurant starts preparing an accepted order
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderAcceptedByRestaurant
when: 📩 StartPreparation
then: ⚡ OrderPreparationStarted
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderMarkedReady🔗 #test-testordermarkedready
Restaurant marks the order ready for pickup/delivery
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderAcceptedByRestaurant, ⚡ OrderPreparationStarted
when: 📩 MarkOrderReady
then: ⚡ OrderMarkedReady
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderDelivered🔗 #test-testorderdelivered
The order is delivered to the customer
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderMarkedReady
when: 📩 MarkOrderDelivered
then: ⚡ OrderDelivered
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderRejected🔗 #test-testorderrejected
Restaurant rejects a placed order
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced
when: 📩 RejectOrder
then: ⚡ OrderRejectedByRestaurant
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderCancelledByCustomer🔗 #test-testordercancelledbycustomer
Customer cancels the order before acceptance
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced
when: 📩 CancelOrderByCustomer
then: ⚡ OrderCancelledByCustomer
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderCancelledByRestaurant🔗 #test-testordercancelledbyrestaurant
Restaurant cancels an order it had accepted
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderAcceptedByRestaurant
when: 📩 CancelOrderByRestaurant
then: ⚡ OrderCancelledByRestaurant
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderRated🔗 #test-testorderrated
Customer rates the delivery (rider thumb) after delivery
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderDelivered
when: 📩 RateOrder
then: ⚡ OrderRated
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderRateOrderIsRejected🔗 #test-testorderrateorderisrejected
Rejects rating the delivery of a missing/not-delivered order or rating it twice
given: (none)
when: 📩 RateOrder
thrown: ⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus, ⛔ OrderAlreadyRated
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderRestaurantRated🔗 #test-testorderrestaurantrated
Customer rates the restaurant after delivery
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderDelivered
when: 📩 RateRestaurant
then: ⚡ RestaurantRated
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderRateRestaurantTwiceIsRejected🔗 #test-testorderraterestauranttwiceisrejected
Rejects rating the restaurant a second time for the same order
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderDelivered, ⚡ RestaurantRated
when: 📩 RateRestaurant
thrown: ⛔ RestaurantAlreadyRated
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderRiderTipped🔗 #test-testorderridertipped
Customer tips the rider after delivery
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderDelivered
when: 📩 TipRider
then: ⚡ RiderTipped
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderTipRiderIsRejected🔗 #test-testordertipriderisrejected
Rejects tipping for a missing/not-delivered order or tipping twice
given: (none)
when: 📩 TipRider
thrown: ⛔ OrderNotFound, ⛔ InvalidOrderStatus, ⛔ RiderAlreadyTipped
▸Test: 🧪 TestOrderRefundRequested🔗 #test-testorderrefundrequested
Customer requests a refund for a delivered order
given: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ OrderDelivered
when: 📩 RequestRefund
then: ⚡ RefundRequested

🎭 PlaceOrderProcess

▸Test: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderCreatesPaymentIntent🔗 #test-testplaceordercreatespaymentintent
Checkout reads the open cart, prices it, and creates a Stripe payment intent
given: ⚡ CartStarted, ⚡ CartLineAdded
when: 📩 PlaceOrder
then: ⚡ PaymentIntentCreated
▸Test: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderIsRejected🔗 #test-testplaceorderisrejected
Rejects checkout when the restaurant is paused, the cart is empty, the delivery address is missing or out of area, or the payment is declined
given: ⚡ CartStarted
when: 📩 PlaceOrder
thrown: ⛔ RestaurantPaused, ⛔ CartEmpty, ⛔ DeliveryAddressRequired, ⛔ OutsideDeliveryArea, ⛔ PaymentDeclined
▸Test: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderPaymentCapturedPlacesOrder🔗 #test-testplaceorderpaymentcapturedplacesorder
On payment capture the saga materializes the order and closes the cart
given: ⚡ PaymentIntentCreated
when: 📩 PaymentCaptured
then: ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ CartCheckedOut
▸Test: 🧪 TestPlaceOrderPaymentFailedPlacesNothing🔗 #test-testplaceorderpaymentfailedplacesnothing
On payment failure the saga aborts and places no order (cart stays open)
given: ⚡ PaymentIntentCreated
when: 📩 PaymentFailed
then: ∅ no event (idempotent no-op)

🎭 RefundProcess

▸Test: 🧪 TestRefundOnOrderRejected🔗 #test-testrefundonorderrejected
Requests a Stripe refund when an order is rejected by the restaurant
given: (none)
when: 📩 OrderRejectedByRestaurant
then: ∅ no event (idempotent no-op)
▸Test: 🧪 TestRefundOnOrderCancelledByCustomer🔗 #test-testrefundonordercancelledbycustomer
Requests a Stripe refund when the customer cancels the order
given: (none)
when: 📩 OrderCancelledByCustomer
then: ∅ no event (idempotent no-op)
▸Test: 🧪 TestRefundOnOrderCancelledByRestaurant🔗 #test-testrefundonordercancelledbyrestaurant
Requests a Stripe refund when the restaurant cancels the order
given: (none)
when: 📩 OrderCancelledByRestaurant
then: ∅ no event (idempotent no-op)
▸Test: 🧪 TestRefundOnRefundRequested🔗 #test-testrefundonrefundrequested
Validates eligibility and requests a Stripe refund on a customer refund request
given: (none)
when: 📩 RefundRequested
then: ∅ no event (idempotent no-op)
▸Test: 🧪 TestRefundSettledFactRecorded🔗 #test-testrefundsettledfactrecorded
Records the settled refund fact reported back by Stripe
given: (none)
when: 📩 PaymentRefunded
then: ∅ no event (idempotent no-op)
📡 Observability (2)
▸Contract: 📡 place-order🔗 #obs-place-order
criticality: high
workflow: saga 🎭 PlaceOrderProcess · command 📩 PlaceOrder
emits: ⚡ PaymentIntentCreated, ⚡ OrderPlaced, ⚡ CartCheckedOut · inbound: ⚡ PaymentCaptured, ⚡ PaymentFailed
run identity
IdSourceReq.Business key
correlation_idcommand.correlation_id✅—
trace_idotel.trace_id✅—
order_iddomain.aggregate_id✅🔤 OrderId
command_typecommand.type✅—
spans (* = required attribute)
SpanKindReq.MultiplicityAttributes
command.receiveSERVER✅—business.command_type*, business.actor*
command.validateINTERNAL✅—business.validation_status*
cart.readINTERNAL✅—business.aggregate_id*
payment.intent.createCLIENT✅—messaging.system*, business.result*
event.store.appendINTERNAL✅—business.event_type*, business.stream_id*
event.publishPRODUCER✅—messaging.system*, business.event_type*
event.consume.projectionCONSUMER✅>= 1business.projection_name*
metrics: place_order_duration_ms (histogram) · business: orders_placed_total (counter), checkout_payment_failures_total (counter)
success ⇐ spans: command.receive, payment.intent.create, event.store.append, event.publish, event.consume.projection
SLOs: p95 ≤ 800ms · p99 ≤ 1500ms · error ≤ 1%
▸Contract: 📡 refund🔗 #obs-refund
criticality: high
workflow: saga 🎭 RefundProcess
emits: — · inbound: ⚡ OrderRejectedByRestaurant, ⚡ OrderCancelledByCustomer, ⚡ OrderCancelledByRestaurant, ⚡ RefundRequested, ⚡ PaymentRefunded
run identity
IdSourceReq.Business key
correlation_idevent.correlation_id✅—
trace_idotel.trace_id✅—
order_iddomain.aggregate_id✅🔤 OrderId
spans (* = required attribute)
SpanKindReq.MultiplicityAttributes
event.consume.triggerCONSUMER✅—business.event_type*, business.correlation_id*
refund.requestCLIENT✅—messaging.system*, business.result*
event.store.appendINTERNAL✅—business.event_type*
metrics: refund_duration_ms (histogram) · business: refunds_settled_total (counter), saga_compensation_total (counter)
success ⇐ spans: refund.request, event.store.append
SLOs: p95 ≤ 1000ms · p99 ≤ 3000ms · error ≤ 2%
🔲 4. customer 🔗
Customer-facing consumer domain: discovery/browse, identity (phone-keyed), favorites, profile, address book, cart & ordering use-cases; cart binding.
🧰 API operations (23)
▸Query: 🔎 phoneCountries🔗 #query-phonecountries
Selectable phone countries for the dialing-code picker (static reference data; the picker sends back the dialingCode '+33').
input: (none)
returns: 🧩 PhoneCountry [] · reads 🗄️ View_PhoneCountry
roles: PUBLIC · V0
▸Query: 🔎 me🔗 #query-me
The signed-in customer's own profile (resolves the session authRef → Customer via View_Customer).
input: (none)
returns: 🧩 CustomerProfile · reads 🗄️ View_Customer
roles: CUSTOMER · V1
▸Query: 🔎 favoriteRestaurants🔗 #query-favoriterestaurants
The customer's favorited restaurants (View_Customer.favorite_restaurant_ids joined to View_Restaurant).
input: 🧩 FavoriteRestaurantsQueryInput! { customerId: 🔤 CustomerId }
returns: 🧩 Restaurant [] · reads 🗄️ View_Restaurant
roles: CUSTOMER · V1
▸Query: 🔎 restaurants🔗 #query-restaurants
Discover: public list of restaurants. All args are optional filters resolved by the read side (View_Restaurant); the query returns only matching restaurants. `list` selects a curated/ personalized shelf (the read model resolves its members).
input: 🧩 RestaurantsQueryInput { search?: string, tags?: [🔤 Tag], serviceType?: 🔤 ServiceType, openNow?: boolean, city?: 🔤 CityName, priceRange?: 🔤 PriceRange, list?: 🔤 RestaurantListKey, listingStatus?: 🔤 RestaurantListingStatus, orderableOnly?: boolean }
returns: 🧩 Restaurant [] · reads 🗄️ View_Restaurant
roles: PUBLIC · V0
▸Query: 🔎 catalog🔗 #query-catalog
A restaurant's full catalog (categories → products → offers + option lists).
input: 🧩 CatalogQueryInput! { restaurantId: 🔤 RestaurantId }
returns: 🧩 Catalog · reads 🗄️ View_Catalog
roles: PUBLIC · V0
▸Query: 🔎 categories🔗 #query-categories
The category tree of a restaurant's catalog (for filtering & product discovery). Derived from View_Catalog.catalog — categories are not a separate aggregate, so there is no dedicated view.
input: 🧩 CategoriesQueryInput! { restaurantId: 🔤 RestaurantId }
returns: 🧩 CatalogCategory [] · reads 🗄️ View_Catalog
roles: PUBLIC · V0
▸Query: 🔎 restaurant🔗 #query-restaurant
A restaurant + its catalog by slug (multi-tenant resolution by Host or /r/{slug}).
input: 🧩 RestaurantQueryInput! { slug: 🔤 Slug }
returns: 🧩 Restaurant · reads 🗄️ View_Restaurant
roles: PUBLIC · V0
▸Query: 🔎 carts🔗 #query-carts
A customer's carts (one OPEN cart per restaurant).
input: 🧩 CartsQueryInput! { customerId: 🔤 CustomerId }
returns: 🧩 Cart [] · reads 🗄️ View_Cart
roles: CUSTOMER, ADMIN · V0
▸Query: 🔎 cart🔗 #query-cart
A single cart by id (session-scoped; readable by the guest/customer who owns it).
input: 🧩 CartQueryInput! { id: 🔤 CartId }
returns: 🧩 Cart · reads 🗄️ View_Cart
roles: PUBLIC · V0
▸Mutation: ✏️ requestPhoneVerification🔗 #mutation-requestphoneverification
command: 📩 RequestPhoneVerification → 🎭 Customer
roles: PUBLIC, CUSTOMER · V0
payload: correlationId
▸Mutation: ✏️ verifyPhone🔗 #mutation-verifyphone
command: 📩 VerifyPhone → 🎭 Customer
roles: PUBLIC, CUSTOMER · V0
payload: correlationId, customerId: 🔤 CustomerId, created: boolean

payload: correlationId

payload: correlationId

▸Mutation: ✏️ changeLanguage🔗 #mutation-changelanguage

▸Mutation: ✏️ markRestaurantAsFavorite🔗 #mutation-markrestaurantasfavorite

▸Mutation: ✏️ unmarkRestaurantAsFavorite🔗 #mutation-unmarkrestaurantasfavorite
command: 📩 UnmarkRestaurantAsFavorite → 🎭 Customer
roles: CUSTOMER · V1

command: 📩 UpdateCustomerInfo → 🎭 Customer

▸Mutation: ✏️ setCustomerPreferences🔗 #mutation-setcustomerpreferences

roles: CUSTOMER · V1
payload: correlationId
▸Mutation: ✏️ setCustomerAddress🔗 #mutation-setcustomeraddress

roles: CUSTOMER · V1
payload: correlationId
▸Mutation: ✏️ removeCustomerAddress🔗 #mutation-removecustomeraddress

roles: CUSTOMER · V1
payload: correlationId

command: 📩 SetCustomerPaymentMethod → 🎭 Customer
roles: CUSTOMER · V1
payload: correlationId
🧩 Output types (1)
▸Type: 🧩 CustomerProfile🔗 #type-customerprofile
A customer's own profile (display name + contact). Backed by the identity read model; surfaced to the customer only (profile management is V1 — no V0 query yet).
read model: 🗄️ View_Customer
FieldTypeReq.
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
displayName🔤 CustomerDisplayName⬜ nullable
email🔤 EmailAddress⬜ nullable
emailVerifiedboolean✅ required
phone🔤 PhoneNumber✅ required
locale🔤 Locale⬜ nullable
timezone🔤 TimeZone⬜ nullable
🎭 Actors (2)
▸Actor: 🎭 Customer🔗 #actor-customer
A customer identity, keyed by phone number and linked to the auth provider user (authRef).
🧩 aggregate
ReceivesEmits →Throws
📩 RequestPhoneVerificationDelegate to Supabase Auth: send an SMS OTP (Twilio; mock in dev). No event.—
📩 VerifyPhone⚡ CustomerRegistered, ⚡ CustomerIdentified⛔ InvalidVerificationCode, ⛔ VerificationCodeExpired
📩 RequestEmailVerificationDelegate to Supabase Auth: send an email magic link (localized via the stored locale). No event.⛔ EmailAlreadyInUse
📩 ConfirmEmailVerification⚡ CustomerEmailVerified⛔ InvalidVerificationToken, ⛔ VerificationCodeExpired
📩 RequestPhoneChangeDelegate to Supabase Auth: send an SMS OTP to the new phone. No event.⛔ PhoneAlreadyInUse
📩 ConfirmPhoneChange⚡ CustomerPhoneChanged⛔ InvalidVerificationCode, ⛔ VerificationCodeExpired, ⛔ PhoneAlreadyInUse
📩 ChangeLanguage⚡ CustomerLanguageChanged—
📩 MarkRestaurantAsFavorite⚡ RestaurantFavorited⛔ RestaurantNotFound
📩 UnmarkRestaurantAsFavorite⚡ RestaurantUnfavorited—
📩 UpdateCustomerInfo⚡ CustomerInfoUpdated⛔ NoEditableFieldProvided
📩 SetCustomerPreferences⚡ CustomerPreferencesSet—
📩 SetCustomerAddress⚡ CustomerAddressSet—
📩 RemoveCustomerAddress⚡ CustomerAddressRemoved—
📩 SetCustomerPaymentMethod⚡ CustomerPaymentMethodSet—
▸Actor: 🎭 CartBindingProcess🔗 #actor-cartbindingprocess
Binds a returning visitor's OPEN guest carts to their Customer. Reacts to the inbound CustomerIdentified fact (authRef → customerId, reported when the visitor signs in) so the View_Cart projection stamps the customerId onto their carts — enabling cross-device carts to converge and be merged at checkout.
⚙️ process manager
ReceivesEmits →Throws
⚡ CustomerIdentifiedBind customerId onto the visitor's OPEN carts (View_Cart projection); no new event in V0.—
🗄️ Views (1)
▸View: 🗄️ View_Customer🔗 #view-view_customer
source: 🎭 Customer · 🛶 V0
Identity/lookup read model: resolves a returning phone (or auth_ref) to an existing Customer, backs VerifyPhone idempotency + auth resolution, and serves the `me` query (CustomerProfile). Also bound when CustomerIdentified stamps carts. The stored `locale` localizes authenticated SMS/email sends.
fed by: ⚡ CustomerRegistered, ⚡ RestaurantRated, ⚡ RestaurantFavorited, ⚡ RestaurantUnfavorited, ⚡ CustomerInfoUpdated, ⚡ CustomerEmailVerified, ⚡ CustomerPhoneChanged, ⚡ CustomerLanguageChanged, ⚡ CustomerPreferencesSet, ⚡ CustomerAddressSet, ⚡ CustomerAddressRemoved, ⚡ CustomerPaymentMethodSet
ColumnTypeSourced fromConstraintsNotes
customer_id🔤 CustomerId (derived)⚡ CustomerRegistered.customerIdPK
phone🔤 PhoneNumber (derived)⚡ CustomerRegistered.phone, ⚡ CustomerPhoneChanged.phoneunique
auth_ref🔤 ExternalReference (derived)⚡ CustomerRegistered.authRefindex, nullableAuth provider user id (Supabase Auth) → Customer.
display_name🔤 CustomerDisplayName (derived)⚡ CustomerRegistered.displayName, ⚡ CustomerInfoUpdated.displayNamenullable
email🔤 EmailAddress (derived)⚡ CustomerRegistered.email, ⚡ CustomerEmailVerified.emailnullable
email_verifiedboolean⚡ CustomerEmailVerified—True once an email magic link has been confirmed (CustomerEmailVerified).
locale🔤 Locale (derived)⚡ CustomerRegistered.locale, ⚡ CustomerLanguageChanged.localenullablei18n culture; set at registration or via ChangeLanguage. Localizes authenticated SMS/email sends.
timezone🔤 TimeZone (derived)⚡ CustomerRegistered.timezone, ⚡ CustomerPreferencesSet.timezonenullable
ratingsjsonb⚡ RestaurantRated—The customer's own submitted ratings (assembled from RestaurantRated): [{ order_id, restaurant_id, stars, comment, rated_at }].
favorite_restaurant_idsjsonb⚡ RestaurantFavorited, ⚡ RestaurantUnfavorited—[restaurant_id] the customer favorited.
preferencesjsonb⚡ CustomerPreferencesSetnullable{ dietary_tags: [...], favorite_cuisines: [...] } from CustomerPreferencesSet.
addressesjsonb⚡ CustomerAddressSet, ⚡ CustomerAddressRemoved—Saved address book: [{ address_id, label, address }] from CustomerAddressSet/Removed.
payment_method_id🔤 PaymentMethodId (derived)⚡ CustomerPaymentMethodSet.paymentMethodIdnullable
updated_attimestamptz⚡ CustomerRegistered, ⚡ CustomerInfoUpdated—Row write time, stamped on each event.
📩 Commands (14)
▸Command: 📩 RequestPhoneVerification🔗 #command-requestphoneverification
Ask Supabase Auth to send an SMS OTP to a phone (Twilio; a mock provider in dev). Emits no event. `locale` localizes the message; when absent it defaults from the dialing code (e.g. '+33' → fr-FR).
dispatched by: ✏️ requestPhoneVerification · handled by 🎭 Customer
emits: —
throws: —
FieldTypeReq.Description
dialingCode🔤 DialingCode✅ required
nationalNumber🔤 NationalPhoneNumber✅ required
locale🔤 Locale⬜ nullableSMS language; defaults from the dialing code's country when absent.
▸Command: 📩 VerifyPhone🔗 #command-verifyphone
Verify the SMS OTP with Supabase Auth, then register-or-identify: a first verified phone CREATES the Customer (CustomerRegistered), a returning phone RESOLVES + signs in (CustomerIdentified). The backend decides new-vs-returning; the client never calls register/identify directly.
dispatched by: ✏️ verifyPhone · handled by 🎭 Customer
emits: ⚡ CustomerRegistered, ⚡ CustomerIdentified
throws: ⛔ InvalidVerificationCode, ⛔ VerificationCodeExpired
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ requiredClient-generated id, used only when the phone is new; ignored for a returning phone.
dialingCode🔤 DialingCode✅ required
nationalNumber🔤 NationalPhoneNumber✅ required
code🔤 OtpCode✅ required
displayName🔤 CustomerDisplayName⬜ nullable
locale🔤 Locale⬜ nullablePersisted on registration; defaults from the dialing code when absent.
timezone🔤 TimeZone⬜ nullable
▸Command: 📩 RequestEmailVerification🔗 #command-requestemailverification
Ask Supabase Auth to email a magic link to verify/link an email for the signed-in customer. Emits no event; the message is localized via the customer's STORED locale (no per-call language param).
dispatched by: ✏️ requestEmailVerification · handled by 🎭 Customer
emits: —
throws: ⛔ EmailAlreadyInUse
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
email🔤 EmailAddress✅ required
▸Command: 📩 ConfirmEmailVerification🔗 #command-confirmemailverification
Confirm an email magic link: the client returns the Supabase token, we VERIFY it server-side and link the now-verified email to the Customer. Used for both the initial email and later changes.
dispatched by: ✏️ confirmEmailVerification · handled by 🎭 Customer
emits: ⚡ CustomerEmailVerified
throws: ⛔ InvalidVerificationToken, ⛔ VerificationCodeExpired
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
token🔤 EmailVerificationToken✅ required
▸Command: 📩 RequestPhoneChange🔗 #command-requestphonechange
Ask Supabase to send an SMS OTP to a NEW phone for a signed-in customer (stored locale). Emits no event.
dispatched by: ✏️ requestPhoneChange · handled by 🎭 Customer
emits: —
throws: ⛔ PhoneAlreadyInUse
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
newDialingCode🔤 DialingCode✅ required
newNationalNumber🔤 NationalPhoneNumber✅ required
▸Command: 📩 ConfirmPhoneChange🔗 #command-confirmphonechange
Verify the OTP on the new phone and change the customer's phone (→ canonical E.164 PhoneNumber).
dispatched by: ✏️ confirmPhoneChange · handled by 🎭 Customer
emits: ⚡ CustomerPhoneChanged
throws: ⛔ InvalidVerificationCode, ⛔ VerificationCodeExpired, ⛔ PhoneAlreadyInUse
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
newDialingCode🔤 DialingCode✅ required
newNationalNumber🔤 NationalPhoneNumber✅ required
code🔤 OtpCode✅ required
▸Command: 📩 ChangeLanguage🔗 #command-changelanguage
Persist the customer's preferred language (the single locale setter). The stored locale then localizes subsequent authenticated SMS/email sends — so they need no per-call language param.
dispatched by: ✏️ changeLanguage · handled by 🎭 Customer
emits: ⚡ CustomerLanguageChanged
throws: —
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
locale🔤 Locale✅ required

⚡ Events (12)
▸Event: ⚡ CustomerRegistered🔗 #event-customerregistered
A customer account was created on first phone verification (passwordless OTP, identity managed by the auth provider). Phone number is the primary identifier.
emitted by: 🎭 Customer
consumed by: —
projected into: 🗄️ View_Customer
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
authRef🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullableAuth provider user id (e.g. Supabase Auth), linking identity to this Customer.
phone🔤 PhoneNumber✅ required
displayName🔤 CustomerDisplayName⬜ nullable
email🔤 EmailAddress⬜ nullableOptional, e.g. captured later for receipts.
locale🔤 Locale⬜ nullablePreferred culture (language + date/time/number display).
timezone🔤 TimeZone⬜ nullable
▸Event: ⚡ CustomerIdentified🔗 #event-customeridentified
A returning visitor signed in and was resolved to an existing Customer (authRef → customerId). NOT an auth event (OTP/session live in the auth provider): this records the DOMAIN fact so the visitor's OPEN guest carts can be bound to the customerId — letting carts started on different devices converge under one customer and be merged at checkout.
emitted by: 🎭 Customer
consumed by: 🎭 CartBindingProcess
projected into: 🗄️ View_Cart
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
authRef🔤 ExternalReference✅ requiredAuth provider user id that was matched to this Customer (via View_Customer.auth_ref).
▸Event: ⚡ RestaurantFavorited🔗 #event-restaurantfavorited
Customer marked a restaurant as a favorite.
emitted by: 🎭 Customer
consumed by: —
projected into: 🗄️ View_Customer
FieldTypeReq.Description
customerId🔤 CustomerId✅ required
restaurantId🔤 RestaurantId✅ required

🔤 Scalars (7)
ScalarTypeDescription
🔤 AddressIdstring uuidIdentifies a saved address in a customer's address book.
🔤 PaymentMethodIdstringStripe PaymentMethod id (provider reference). Example: 'pm_1Nabc...'.
🔤 DialingCodestring ^\+[0-9]{1,4}$Country dialing/calling code in '+NN' form (e.g. '+33', '+1'). This is what the phone-country picker emits and what the auth commands receive — NOT the ISO country code.
🔤 NationalPhoneNumberstringNational (subscriber) part of a phone number, without the dialing code. E.g. '0612345678' or '612345678'.
🔤 OtpCodestring ^[0-9]{4,8}$One-time SMS code from Supabase Auth (sent via Twilio; a mock provider in dev).
🔤 EmailVerificationTokenstringOpaque Supabase token from an email magic link; verified server-side (never trusted as a bare client claim).
🔤 Localestring ^[a-z]{2}-[A-Z]{2}$i18n culture code, language-REGION (BCP 47 / .NET CultureInfo). Example: 'fr-FR', 'en-US'. Drives the UI language AND the display of dates, times and numbers (paired with TimeZone for the zone).
⛔ Errors (5)
ErrorDescriptionMessage (en)Message (fr)Thrown by
⛔ InvalidVerificationCodeThe SMS OTP code does not match (rejected by Supabase Auth).🇬🇧 The verification code is incorrect. Please try again.🇫🇷 Le code de vérification est incorrect. Veuillez réessayer.📩 VerifyPhone, 📩 ConfirmPhoneChange
⛔ VerificationCodeExpiredThe SMS OTP (or email link) has expired; request a new one.🇬🇧 The verification code has expired. Please request a new one.🇫🇷 Le code de vérification a expiré. Veuillez en demander un nouveau.📩 VerifyPhone, 📩 ConfirmEmailVerification, 📩 ConfirmPhoneChange
⛔ InvalidVerificationTokenThe email magic-link token failed server-side verification with Supabase Auth.🇬🇧 This email verification link is invalid or has already been used.🇫🇷 Ce lien de vérification d'e-mail est invalide ou a déjà été utilisé.📩 ConfirmEmailVerification
⛔ EmailAlreadyInUseThe email is already linked to another customer.🇬🇧 The email '{email}' is already in use by another account.🇫🇷 L'e-mail '{email}' est déjà utilisé par un autre compte.📩 RequestEmailVerification
⛔ PhoneAlreadyInUseThe phone number is already linked to another customer (on change).🇬🇧 The phone number '{phone}' is already in use by another account.🇫🇷 Le numéro '{phone}' est déjà utilisé par un autre compte.📩 RequestPhoneChange, 📩 ConfirmPhoneChange
🧪 Tests (2)

🎭 Customer

▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerRequestPhoneVerification🔗 #test-testcustomerrequestphoneverification
Sends an SMS OTP to a phone (localized via the dialing code); emits nothing
given: (none)
when: 📩 RequestPhoneVerification
then: ∅ no event (idempotent no-op)
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerVerifyPhoneRegisters🔗 #test-testcustomerverifyphoneregisters
Verifying the OTP on a new phone registers the customer
given: (none)
when: 📩 VerifyPhone
then: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerVerifyPhoneReturningIdentifies🔗 #test-testcustomerverifyphonereturningidentifies
Verifying the OTP on a known phone identifies the returning customer
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 VerifyPhone
then: ⚡ CustomerIdentified
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerVerifyPhoneIsRejected🔗 #test-testcustomerverifyphoneisrejected
Rejects phone verification when the OTP is wrong or expired
given: (none)
when: 📩 VerifyPhone
thrown: ⛔ InvalidVerificationCode, ⛔ VerificationCodeExpired
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerRequestEmailVerification🔗 #test-testcustomerrequestemailverification
Sends an email magic link to verify/link an email; emits nothing
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 RequestEmailVerification
then: ∅ no event (idempotent no-op)
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerRequestEmailVerificationDuplicateIsRejected🔗 #test-testcustomerrequestemailverificationduplicateisrejected
Rejects requesting email verification for an email already used by another account
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 RequestEmailVerification
thrown: ⛔ EmailAlreadyInUse
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerConfirmEmailVerification🔗 #test-testcustomerconfirmemailverification
Confirms the email magic link (token verified server-side) and links the email
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 ConfirmEmailVerification
then: ⚡ CustomerEmailVerified

given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 ConfirmEmailVerification
thrown: ⛔ InvalidVerificationToken, ⛔ VerificationCodeExpired

Sends an OTP to a new phone for a phone change; emits nothing
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 RequestPhoneChange
then: ∅ no event (idempotent no-op)
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerRequestPhoneChangeDuplicateIsRejected🔗 #test-testcustomerrequestphonechangeduplicateisrejected
Rejects changing to a phone already used by another account
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 RequestPhoneChange
thrown: ⛔ PhoneAlreadyInUse
▸Test: 🧪 TestCustomerConfirmPhoneChange🔗 #test-testcustomerconfirmphonechange
Confirms the OTP on the new phone and changes the phone
given: ⚡ CustomerRegistered
when: 📩 ConfirmPhoneChange
then: ⚡ CustomerPhoneChanged

when: 📩 UnmarkRestaurantAsFavorite
then: ∅ no event (idempotent no-op)

📡 Observability (1)
▸Contract: 📡 customer-identification🔗 #obs-customer-identification
criticality: high
workflow: · command 📩 VerifyPhone
emits: ⚡ CustomerRegistered, ⚡ CustomerIdentified · inbound: —
run identity
IdSourceReq.Business key
correlation_idcommand.correlation_id✅—
trace_idotel.trace_id✅—
customer_iddomain.aggregate_id✅🔤 CustomerId
spans (* = required attribute)
SpanKindReq.MultiplicityAttributes
command.receiveSERVER✅—business.command_type*
otp.verifyCLIENT✅—messaging.system*, business.result*
event.store.appendINTERNAL✅—business.event_type*
event.publishPRODUCER✅—business.event_type*
metrics: customer_identification_duration_ms (histogram) · business: customer_signins_total (counter), otp_verifications_failed_total (counter)
success ⇐ spans: command.receive, otp.verify, event.store.append, event.publish
SLOs: p95 ≤ 600ms · p99 ≤ 1200ms · error ≤ 2%
🔲 5. cross-cutting 🔗
Shared vocabulary and operations that span several bounded contexts (or belong to none).
🧰 API operations (2)
▸Query: 🔎 operation🔗 #query-operation
Poll a command/operation's status by its correlationId (the pull counterpart of the operationStatusChanged subscription). Transient — resolver-served, no View_*.
input: 🧩 OperationQueryInput! { correlationId: 🔤 CorrelationId }
returns: 🧩 Operation · reads —
roles: CUSTOMER, RESTAURANT, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT, ADMIN · V0
▸Subscription: 🔔 operationStatusChanged🔗 #subscription-operationstatuschanged
Operation status change events (for the owning customer or restaurant).
input: 🧩 OperationStatusChangedSubscriptionInput! { correlationId: 🔤 CorrelationId }
streams: 🧩 Operation
roles: CUSTOMER, RESTAURANT, RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT · V0
🧩 Output types (8)
▸Type: 🧩 Product🔗 #type-product
A catalog product grouping one or more purchasable offers.
read model: (within a parent projection)
FieldTypeReq.
id🔤 ProductId✅ required
categoryRef🔤 ExternalReference⬜ nullable
name🔤 ProductName✅ required
description🔤 ProductDescription⬜ nullable
tags[🔤 Tag]✅ required
imageIds[🔤 ImageId]✅ required
taxRate📦 TaxRate✅ required
offers[🧩 Offer]✅ required
▸Type: 🧩 Offer🔗 #type-offer
A purchasable offer (SKU) of a product, with its price and derived availability.
read model: (within a parent projection)
FieldTypeReq.
id🔤 OfferId✅ required
name🔤 OfferName✅ required
price📦 Money✅ required
availability🔤 CatalogItemAvailability✅ required
stockStatus🔤 StockStatus✅ required
optionListIds[🔤 OptionListId]✅ required
▸Type: 🧩 OptionList🔗 #type-optionlist
A modifier group (HubRise option list).
read model: (within a parent projection)
FieldTypeReq.
id🔤 OptionListId✅ required
name🔤 OptionListName✅ required
minSelectionsinteger✅ required
maxSelectionsinteger⬜ nullable
multipleSelectionboolean✅ required
options[🧩 Option]✅ required
▸Type: 🧩 Option🔗 #type-option
A selectable option within an option list.
read model: (within a parent projection)
FieldTypeReq.
id🔤 OptionId✅ required
name🔤 OptionName✅ required
price📦 Money✅ required
defaultboolean✅ required
availability🔤 CatalogItemAvailability✅ required
stockStatus🔤 StockStatus⬜ nullable
▸Type: 🧩 PhoneCountry🔗 #type-phonecountry
A selectable phone country for the dialing-code picker (static reference data).
read model: 🗄️ View_PhoneCountry
FieldTypeReq.
country🔤 CountryCode✅ required
dialingCode🔤 DialingCode✅ required
namestring✅ required
defaultLocale🔤 Locale✅ required
▸Type: 🧩 PaymentIntent🔗 #type-paymentintent
Stripe PaymentIntent handle for the checkout step. NON-PROJECTED (transient): it is returned via the PlaceOrder mutation payload, never read through a View_* — hence no `reads`.
read model: (within a parent projection)
FieldTypeReq.
paymentIntentId🔤 PaymentIntentId✅ required
clientSecretstring✅ required
statusstring✅ required
▸Type: 🧩 Operation🔗 #type-operation
Live status of a command/operation, streamed by the `operationStatusChanged` subscription and correlated by `correlationId` (every mutation payload carries one). NON-PROJECTED (transient) — no backing View_*, hence no `reads`.
read model: (within a parent projection)
FieldTypeReq.
correlationId🔤 CorrelationId✅ required
status🔤 OperationStatus✅ required
messagestring⬜ nullable
occurredAtstring date-time✅ required
▸Type: 🧩 Rider🔗 #type-rider
Delivery courier. POST-V0 placeholder — delivery is not modelled as an aggregate yet, so this type carries no backing view and uses a minimal shape until the delivery domain lands.
read model: (within a parent projection)
FieldTypeReq.
riderId🔤 RiderId✅ required
displayNamestring✅ required
phone🔤 PhoneNumber⬜ nullable

Phone-country reference for the dialing-code picker. The picker emits the `dialing_code` ('+33').

FieldTypeReq.Description

collection🔤 TaxRatePercent⬜ nullable
eatIn🔤 TaxRatePercent⬜ nullable

FieldTypeReq.Description
line1🔤 AddressLine✅ required

🔤 Scalars (27)
ScalarTypeDescription
🔤 RestaurantIdstring uuidA single restaurant location (HubRise: location), belonging to a RestaurantAccount.
🔤 ProductIdstring uuidA product groups one or more offers (HubRise: product).
🔤 OfferIdstring uuidA purchasable offer with its own price (HubRise: SKU).
🔤 CustomerIdstring uuid
🔤 DeliveryJobIdstring uuid
🔤 RiderIdstring uuidDelivery courier id. POST-V0 placeholder (no delivery aggregate yet).
🔤 UserIdstring uuid
🔤 ExternalReferencestringExternal reference code (HubRise `ref`), unique within its scope. Used for idempotent import/sync and as a stable reference inside orders. Example: 'MARGHERITA', 'CAT-PIZZAS'.
🔤 Slugstring ^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$URL-safe identifier for restaurants. Lowercase, dash-separated. Example: 'chez-marco', 'tokyo-sushi'.
🔤 RestaurantDisplayNamestringPublic label shown to customers. Can be short and brand-oriented. Example: 'Chez Marco', 'Tokyo Sushi'.
🔤 ProductNamestring
🔤 OfferNamestringOffer label, unique within a product (HubRise SKU name). Example: 'Small', 'Large', 'Default'.
🔤 OptionNamestring
🔤 TagstringFree-form label (HubRise: tags). Example: 'vegan', 'spicy', 'eco'.
🔤 EmailAddressstring email
🔤 PhoneNumberstringCanonical E.164 phone (e.g. '+33612345678'). Composed server-side from DialingCode + NationalPhoneNumber and stored on events/views. Validation enforced at application level.
🔤 AddressLinestring
🔤 PostalCodestring
🔤 CountryCodestring ^[A-Z]{2}$ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Example: 'FR'.
🔤 TimeZonestringIANA timezone. Example: 'Europe/Paris'.
🔤 CurrencyCodestring ^[A-Z]{3}$ISO 4217 currency code. Example: 'EUR'.
🔤 TaxRatePercentnumberPercentage tax rate. Example: 10.0 for 10%.
🔤 QuantitynumberStock quantity in units. Decimals allowed to match HubRise inventory. 0 means out of stock.
🔤 CustomerDisplayNamestring
🔤 ServiceTypeenum (DELIVERY | COLLECTION)Aligned with HubRise service types. COLLECTION == customer pickup. (EAT_IN is not offered by Captain.Food but is kept in TaxRate for catalog fidelity.)
🔤 OperationStatusenum (PENDING | SUCCEEDED | REJECTED | FAILED)Live status of a command/operation streamed by the operationStatusChanged subscription: PENDING (accepted, in flight), SUCCEEDED, REJECTED (business invariant), FAILED (technical error)."
🔤 UserTypeenum (PUBLIC | CUSTOMER | RESTAURANT_ACCOUNT | RESTAURANT | RIDER | ADMIN | EXTERNAL)
⛔ Errors (10)
ErrorDescriptionMessage (en)Message (fr)Thrown by
⛔ UnauthorizedNo valid authentication for this path/role.🇬🇧 You must be signed in to do this.🇫🇷 Vous devez être connecté pour effectuer cette action.—
⛔ ForbiddenAuthenticated, but not allowed to act on this resource (e.g. not the owner).🇬🇧 You are not allowed to perform this action.🇫🇷 Vous n'êtes pas autorisé à effectuer cette action.—
⛔ ValidationErrorInput failed schema validation (type, format, required, bounds).🇬🇧 The field '{field}' is invalid.🇫🇷 Le champ '{field}' est invalide.—
⛔ ConflictConcurrent modification (optimistic-concurrency version clash); retry.🇬🇧 This item was modified meanwhile. Please retry.🇫🇷 Cet élément a été modifié entre-temps. Veuillez réessayer.—
⛔ RateLimitedToo many requests on this path.🇬🇧 Too many requests. Please slow down.🇫🇷 Trop de requêtes. Veuillez patienter.—
⛔ InternalUnexpected server error.🇬🇧 Something went wrong on our side.🇫🇷 Une erreur est survenue de notre côté.—
⛔ RestaurantNotFoundNo restaurant with this id.🇬🇧 Restaurant not found.🇫🇷 Restaurant introuvable.📩 ActivateRestaurant, 📩 UpdateRestaurant, 📩 DeactivateRestaurant, 📩 ChangeOrderAcceptanceMode, 📩 RemoveRestaurant, 📩 UpdateRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfile, 📩 MarkRestaurantClosed, 📩 ClaimRestaurantListing, 📩 OptOutRestaurantListing, 📩 ChangeRestaurantListingStatus, 📩 ConfigureGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLink, 📩 VerifyGoogleBusinessProfileOrderLink, 📩 CreateCatalog, 📩 MarkRestaurantAsFavorite, 📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ RestaurantNotActiveOperation requires an ACTIVE restaurant.🇬🇧 The restaurant '{restaurantName}' is not active.🇫🇷 Le restaurant '{restaurantName}' n'est pas actif.📩 ChangeOrderAcceptanceMode, 📩 PlaceOrder
⛔ NoEditableFieldProvidedUpdate command carried no editable field.🇬🇧 Provide at least one field to update.🇫🇷 Indiquez au moins un champ à modifier.📩 UpdateRestaurantAccount, 📩 UpdateRestaurant, 📩 UpdateCustomerInfo
⛔ OfferNotFoundNo offer with this id in the catalog.🇬🇧 Product offer not found.🇫🇷 Offere de produit introuvable.📩 UpdateOfferStock, 📩 AddCartLine
🏛️ Architecture (C4) 🔗
system: Captain.Food — Local-first food ordering & delivery for independent restaurants and food trucks (V0: Tours).

🔲 L2 — Bounded contexts

ContextDescriptionAggregates / process managers
🔲 restaurantRestaurant provider domain: accounts, locations, lifecycle, order-acceptance mode (incl. catalog & order-fulfilment operations performed by restaurant staff).🎭 RestaurantAccount, 🎭 Restaurant, 🎭 Prospect
🔲 catalogCatalog tree, products, offers (SKUs), option lists, per-offer stock; HubRise import.🎭 Catalog
🔲 orderCart selection → checkout → order lifecycle, incl. the checkout & refund sagas (the V0 risk point: external Stripe).🎭 Cart, 🎭 Order · 🎭 PlaceOrderProcess, 🎭 RefundProcess
🔲 customerCustomer-facing consumer domain: discovery/browse, identity (phone-keyed), favorites, profile, address book, cart & ordering use-cases; cart binding.🎭 Customer · 🎭 CartBindingProcess

🧱 L2 — Containers

ContainerTechnologyDescription
🧱 web-clientNext.js (App Router), React, TypeScript, TailwindCustomer mobile-first web client; multi-tenant via {restaurantSlug}.captain.food.
🧱 web-restaurantNext.js, React, TypeScriptRestaurant web app/dashboard: onboarding (incl. Google Business Profile 'Order online' setup — ADR-019), catalog, order queue, payouts (/restaurant-account/graphql, /restaurant/graphql).
🧱 web-adminNext.js, React, TypeScriptPlatform back-office for Captain.Food staff (/admin/graphql): restaurant approvals, pre-registration pipeline, ops.
🧱 mobile-customerReact Native / Expo (iOS + Android)Customer mobile app (post-V0); same GraphQL API as web-client (/customer/graphql, /public/graphql).
🧱 mobile-restaurantReact Native / ExpoRestaurant-staff mobile app (post-V0): order queue, accept/ready (/restaurant/graphql).
🧱 mobile-riderReact Native / ExpoDelivery-rider mobile app (post-V0): assigned deliveries + status updates (/rider/graphql).
🧱 apiNode + TypeScript (Hono or NestJS), GraphQLCQRS-light write+read API. Hosts command handlers, projections, GraphQL gateway. Role = path (/{role}/graphql).
realizes: 🎭 RestaurantAccount, 🎭 Restaurant, 🎭 Prospect, 🎭 Catalog, 🎭 Cart, 🎭 Order, 🎭 Customer, 🎭 PlaceOrderProcess, 🎭 RefundProcess, 🎭 CartBindingProcess
🧱 event-storeManaged PostgreSQL (e.g. Supabase)Append-only domain_events table (the write model / source of truth at runtime).
🧱 read-modelsManaged PostgreSQLDenormalized View_* projection tables fed from the event log; queries read here, never domain_events.
🧱 sync-workerScheduled worker (GitHub Actions cron + Node)Restaurant listing sync (ADR-0020): polls INSEE Sirene + Google Maps and, via the ACL, calls the api's RegisterRestaurant / UpdateRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfile / MarkRestaurantClosed as the owner. Prospection scoring/outreach is a later step.
🧱 bamProjection workerBusiness Activity Monitoring projector — consumes the same event stream to answer business questions.
🧱 otel-collectorOpenTelemetry CollectorReceives traces/metrics/logs from the api and bam containers; exports to the backend(s).

🔌 L2 — External systems

SystemDescription
🔌 stripePayments (PaymentIntent capture, refunds); later Stripe Connect.
🔌 hubriseExisting restaurant catalog/orders systems; import via the Anti-Corruption Layer.
🔌 delivery-partnerDelivery partner (e.g. Avelo37); post-V0.
🔌 supabase-authPasswordless OTP identity for customers (not a domain concern).
🔌 sireneINSEE Sirene / Recherche d'Entreprises (Etalab open data): SIRET, name, address, NAF, active/closed. Seeds listings via the ACL.
🔌 google-mapsGoogle Maps Places / Business Profile: rating, reviews, hours, phone, website, place id, and the 'Order online' link (ADR-0021). Enrichment + ownership proof.
🔌 hubspotCRM for B2B prospection leads (ADR-0020); post-V0.
🔌 resendTransactional email for prospection outreach sequences (ADR-0020); post-V0.
🔌 slackOps/prospection alerts (active-partner closures, sequence events); post-V0.

➡️ L2 — Relationships

EdgeDescription
web-client → apiGraphQL over HTTPS (/customer/graphql, /public/graphql)
web-restaurant → apiGraphQL (/restaurant-account/graphql, /restaurant/graphql)
web-admin → apiGraphQL (/admin/graphql)
mobile-customer → apiGraphQL (/customer/graphql, /public/graphql) — post-V0
mobile-restaurant → apiGraphQL (/restaurant/graphql) — post-V0
mobile-rider → apiGraphQL (/rider/graphql) — post-V0
api → event-storeAppend domain events (command side)
api → read-modelsRead projections (query side) + projection updates
api → stripeCreate PaymentIntents, request refunds; receive webhooks (inbound facts)
api → hubriseImport catalog / sync inventory via ACL (inbound facts)
api → supabase-authOTP verify / session (out of domain)
api → delivery-partnerDispatch + status (post-V0; inbound facts)
sync-worker → sirenePoll establishments (SIRET/NAF/address/closures)
sync-worker → google-mapsFetch Business Profile data (rating/reviews/hours/website)
sync-worker → apiRegister/enrich/close listings + record prospect contacts via the ACL (/external/graphql)
api → google-mapsVerify restaurant ownership (GBP) for claim/opt-out
sync-worker → hubspotCreate/update prospection leads (ADR-0020)
sync-worker → resendSend prospection outreach emails (ADR-0020)
sync-worker → slackProspection / ops alerts (ADR-0020)
bam → event-storeConsume the event stream for business metrics
api → otel-collectorExport traces/metrics/logs (OTLP)
bam → otel-collectorExport traces/metrics/logs (OTLP)

⚙️ L3 — Components of the api container

ComponentInstrumentedDescriptionBinds
⚙️ graphql-gateway📡 yesPer-role GraphQL endpoint (/{role}/graphql); applies the @auth/@public ACL; entry span (SERVER).—
⚙️ observability-middleware📡 yesAttaches business.* attributes + correlation/cause ids to spans; structured JSON logging; the only place domain context meets OTel.—
⚙️ command-bus📡 yesDispatches commands to handlers; span 'command.receive'/'command.validate'/'command.handle'.—
⚙️ command-handlers— noOne handler per aggregate; validates invariants then appends events. Pure domain — NOT instrumented.handles 🎭 RestaurantAccount, 🎭 Restaurant, 🎭 Prospect, 🎭 Catalog, 🎭 Cart, 🎭 Order, 🎭 Customer
⚙️ process-managers📡 yesSagas coordinating aggregates + externals (checkout, refund, cart binding).handles 🎭 PlaceOrderProcess, 🎭 RefundProcess, 🎭 CartBindingProcess
⚙️ event-store-adapter📡 yesAppends to domain_events; span 'event.store.append' with business.event_type/stream_id.—
⚙️ event-publisher📡 yesPublishes appended events to the bus; span 'event.publish' (PRODUCER).—
⚙️ message-consumers📡 yesConsume domain + inbound integration events; span 'event.consume.*' (CONSUMER).—
⚙️ projection-updaters📡 yesUpdate the View_* read models from events; span 'event.consume.projection'.updates 🗄️ View_RestaurantAccount, 🗄️ View_Restaurant, 🗄️ View_Customer, 🗄️ View_Catalog, 🗄️ View_Cart, 🗄️ View_OrderTracking, 🗄️ View_ProspectionPipeline
⚙️ bam-projector📡 yesBusiness Activity Monitoring projection (runs in the bam container); business_metrics only.—
⚙️ hubrise-acl📡 yesAnti-Corruption Layer translating HubRise payloads (SKU/option_list/'9.80 EUR') into the domain.—
⚙️ stripe-adapter📡 yesCreates PaymentIntents / refunds; records inbound webhook facts (PaymentCaptured/Failed/Refunded).—
⚙️ supabase-acl📡 yesAnti-Corruption Layer wrapping Supabase Auth (ADR-0015): sends/verifies phone OTP (Twilio; mock in dev) and email magic links SYNCHRONOUSLY, validates tokens server-side, and translates the Supabase user (id/phone/email) into the domain (authRef). Keeps the Supabase SDK out of the aggregates.—
⚙️ sirene-google-acl📡 yesAnti-Corruption Layer translating INSEE Sirene + Google Maps data into Restaurant commands (RegisterRestaurant / UpdateRestaurantGoogleBusinessProfile / MarkRestaurantClosed) as the owner, and validating Google Business Profile ownership proofs for claim/opt-out (ADR-0019/0021). Keeps Sirene/Google SDKs out of the aggregate.—
⚙️ prospection-acl📡 yesB2B prospection worker (ADR-0020): reads the COMPUTED score from View_ProspectionPipeline, applies the J+0/J+7/J+21 schedule + anti-spam, fires HubSpot/Resend/Slack, then issues RecordProspectContact / MarkProspectCold to record the facts. The score is never an input it stores back.—
🗺️ System map (interactive) 🔗

Drill in: System → container → bounded context → aggregate flow. Boxes are colored by kind (containers/aggregates teal, externals orange, contexts gold, commands yellow, events purple, views blue). Click to go deeper; leaf boxes jump to their section; use ◀ back to climb out.
